meta.title: FISTIK — Artisan Bakery
meta.description: Luxury handcrafted cakes and pastries. Order for delivery.

hero.subtitle: Luxury handcrafted cakes — made with love, delivered to you

home.coverTagline: Handcrafted luxury treats — made with love

menuPage.title: Menu — FISTIK
menuPage.heading: Our menu
menuPage.subtitle: Browse by category or see everything

catalog.empty: No products available at the moment.
catalog.semiFrozenNotice: Semi-finished products are frozen at −18 °C in special packaging. Boreks are ready to bake; waffle is pre-cooked — heat and serve at home.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.step4Desc: Your order will be saved and shared via WhatsApp. Our team will contact you shortly.
checkout.pickupInfo: Pick up your order at our atelier. Address and time will be shared after confirmation.
checkout.phoneHint: Enter your number — (+7) is shown on the left. Clear with × or Backspace.
checkout.deliveryTimeNotice: Delivery time: our sales representative will call after order confirmation to agree on a convenient time.

errors.phoneRequired: Enter a valid number (10 digits, +7 added automatically)
errors.formInvalid: Please fix the highlighted fields (phone must be 10 digits).
errors.saveFailed: Order could not be saved. Check your connection and try again.
errors.insufficientStock: Some items in your cart are sold out. Please review the menu and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Products you've loved
favorites.emptySub: Tap the heart to save products you love

about.title: About FISTIK
about.intro: FISTIK is a boutique dessert atelier where every detail matters. For Instagram guests, we offer a fast, elegant and personal ordering experience.
about.story: Every dessert tells a story. We blend traditional recipes with modern presentation for your special moments.
about.craft: All products are made in small batches with fresh ingredients and care.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: For orders, special requests or questions.
contact.hoursValue: Daily 09:00 – 21:00. Delivery time confirmed after order approval.

footer.tagline: Artisan bakery in Kaskelen — handcrafted cakes and pastries.
